info.title: UberEats Service
info.description:
UberEats Service

 **Last update**: 29 ene 26, 05:07 p. m.

get.description: Retrieve a specific Uber Eats store record from the integration platform
Retrieves a specific location by its ID

put.description: Updates the warehouse information for a specific location

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of location records

accountId.description: The account ID to import locations for

message.description: A message about the import process status

parameters.name: id

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

message.example: Ok but some changes are required

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

paymentSystemId.description:
Id of the `Payment System` related to the account. See [Payment Method](v2/service/jef#tag/Payment-Method)
If the account has importOrders enabled, this field is required.

salesChannels.description:
Sales Channels related to the account. See [Sales Channel](v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel)
If the account has importOrders enabled, this field is required.

commerceId.description: Id of the `Sales Channel` in Janis Commerce Service. See [Sales Channel](v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel)

uberStoreId.description: The id of the uber store related with the Sales Channel.

publishCatalog.description: Setting that indicates if the account has catalog publishing enabled

enableComposedOrderCommerceId.description: Setting that allows us to use a composite identifier for Uber orders

FormattedSalesChannels.description: Sales Channels related to the account. See [Sales Channel](v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel)

commerceId.description: Id of the `Sales Channel` in Janis Commerce Service. See [Sales Channel](v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel)

uberStoreId.description: The id of the uber store related with the Sales Channel.

SalesChannelLocation.description: The location of the uber store.

IntegrationStore.description: Store object from Uber Eats integration

street_address_line_one.example: C. de Arturo Soria, 333 Madrid, Spain

accountId.description: This refer to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

integrationId.description: The integration store ID from Uber Eats

warehouseId.description: The warehouse ID associated with this location

salesChannelId.description: The sales channel ID associated with this location

accountAvailableSalesChannels.description: List of sales channel IDs available for the account

accountId.description: The id of the account associated with the order

deliveryId.description: The id associated with order shipping

accountName.description: The name of the account associated with the order

source.description: The source of the status change

eventType.description: The event type of the status order

integrationOrderId.description: The Uber ID of the order

storeId.description: The user_id of the order. This is the equivalent of store_id for Uber

clientId.description: The client id of the order

account.description: The name of the account that originated the status change

loggingData.description: A list of logging information of the status change process

status.description: The order status change processing status

OrderStatusChangeList.description: A list of Order Status Changes

productId.description: A sku price and base price

priceBySalesChannel.description: The sku's price for each sales channel

stockBySalesChannel.description: The sku's stock for each sales channel
